statConfig.statIncreaseHint: Stat increases are gained at levels 4, 5, 8, 9, 12, 13, 16, 17, and 20
statConfig.baseScoresWarning: Your base scores do not match any of the standard Nimble stat arrays.
statConfig.bonusesSubtitle: Modifiers from feats, items, and other sources
statConfig.noBonuses: No bonuses from feats or items
statConfig.statIncreasesSubtitle: Improvements gained at certain class levels
statConfig.statAtMax: Stat is at its maximum (+5 from increases)
statConfig.primaryTooltip: +1 to one of your Key Stats
statConfig.secondaryTooltip: +1 to one of your Secondary Stats

chat.noHealingRecord: No healing record found to undo

startingEquipment.hint: Heroes start with the equipment listed for their class and background OR 50 gp to buy their starting equipment.
startingEquipment.goldDescription: Receive 50 gp to purchase your own equipment

characterCreation.incompleteStepsWarning: Some character creation steps have not been completed.
characterCreation.incompleteCharacterMessage: This character isn’t finished. Create anyway?
characterCreation.missingCharacterName: Please enter a name for your character before creating.

ancestryOptions.sizeCategoryHint: Choose your character's size category from those available to your ancestry.
ancestryOptions.enhancedSaveHint: Choose a neutral save to enhance with advantage.

backgroundOptionsSelection.hint: Your background lets you choose which ancestry raised you. This grants you their native language.

bonusLanguageSelection.hint: All heroes speak Common by default, and some backgrounds will grant another language. Additionally, each point of INT grants an additional language known.

saveConfig.abilityModifierSubtitle: Base modifier from linked ability score
saveConfig.ancestryTraitsSubtitle: Features that enhance a save of your choice

armorEffects.medium: Monsters with Medium Armor ignore all damage modifiers from stats and other effects, taking damage from the sum of the dice only.
armorEffects.heavy: Monsters with Heavy Armor ignore damage modifiers and take half the sum of the dice (rounding up).

conditionDescriptions.blinded: Can't see. Attacks against you have advantage, and your attacks have disadvantage.
conditionDescriptions.charged: Whenever you take lightning damage you are Charged for 1 minute.
conditionDescriptions.charmed: Sees the charmer as an ally. Charmer has advantage on social interactions with you.
conditionDescriptions.concentration: Can only Concentrate on 1 thing at a time. DC 10 STR save when crit or lose concentration.
conditionDescriptions.dazed:
Heroes: lose 1 action.

Monsters: can perform one less action on their next turn.
conditionDescriptions.dead: You die when you have taken 6 Wounds (unless you have an ability that changes this number). There are ways to revive a hero who has died, but they are rare and often come at a very steep cost.
conditionDescriptions.despair: Disadvantage on the next attack you make in this encounter.
conditionDescriptions.distracted: A target is distracted if it is adjacent to or Taunted by an ally, or if it cannot see you.
conditionDescriptions.dying: At 0HP. Taking damage while dying causes 2 Wounds, a crit causes 3 instead.
conditionDescriptions.frightened: Disadvantage on rolls when source of fear is nearby; speed halved when moving closer to it.
conditionDescriptions.grappled: Cannot move. Attacks against you have advantage.
conditionDescriptions.hampered: Any creature with their actions or movement reduce (e.g. Dazed, Grappled, Prone, Difficult Terrain).
conditionDescriptions.incapacitated: Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.invisible: Cannot be seen. Your attacks have advantage, and attacks against you have disadvantage.
conditionDescriptions.lastStand: At 0 HP, the legendary monster is dying and gains dangerous new capabilities. They finally die after a small amount of additional damage.
conditionDescriptions.paralyzed: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.petrified: Incapacitated. You have all the benefits and drawbacks of being a rock! Immune to most damage except from large explosions, picks, or similar tools.
conditionDescriptions.prone: Movement costs twice as much, and disadvantage on attacks. Melee attacks against you have advantage; Ranged have disadvantage. Spend 3 spaces of your Speed to stand up.
conditionDescriptions.restrained: Cannot move. Attacks against you have advantage.
conditionDescriptions.riding: You move with the creature you are riding. Any attacks that miss you, strike them.
conditionDescriptions.silenced: Cannot cast spells or use other abilities that require speaking (e.g. Commander's Orders).
conditionDescriptions.smoldering: Some fire spells can inflict the Smoldering condition and gain additional destructive effects against Smoldering enemies.
conditionDescriptions.stunned: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.taunted: Disadvantage on attacks except against the most recent taunter.
conditionDescriptions.unconscious: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.wounded: Has any Wounds (typically 6 Wounds and a hero is dead).

languageHints.draconic: Typically spoken by Dragons, Dragonkin, and Kobolds.
languageHints.dwarvish: Typically spoken by Dwarves, Gnomes, and Giants.
languageHints.elvish: Typically spoken by Elves, Fey, and Sylvan.
languageHints.goblin: Typically spoken by Goblins and Orcs.
languageHints.primordial: Spoken by Elementals and Ancient Beings.

hints.skillPointAssignment: You may assign a single skill point to a skill of your choice. In addition, you may transfer one of your assigned skill points to another skill of your choice.
hints.characterCreationSkillPointAssignment: You can now assign 4 skills points to increase the modifiers for your skills.
hints.statAssignment: Below you will find the stat bonuses granted by your selected array. Drag and drop each of these values onto one of the attribute boxes below to assign your stats.
hints.hideRollsFromPlayersByDefaultHint: When enabled, skill check and weapon roll dialogs will default to hiding the roll from other players.

statIncrease.capstoneDescription: Select any 2 stats to increase by +1

levelUpDialog.skillPointsOverMax: One or more skills would exceed the 12 point cap. Please reallocate skill points before submitting.
levelUpDialog.skillPointsOverMaxTooltip: A skill would exceed the 12 point cap
levelUpDialog.rollHitDiceTooltip: Roll your Hit Die with advantage and increase your max HP by that much.
levelUpDialog.featuresHint: The following features are available at this level for your class.

levelDownDialog.warningMessage: This action will permanently revert the last level up. This cannot be undone.
levelDownDialog.levelUpInProgress: Cannot revert level while a level up is in progress.

skillPointAssignment.onlyOneNewPointAndOneTransferAllowed: Only 1 new point and 1 transfer are allowed per level-up.
skillPointAssignment.reduceAnotherSkillFirstToAddSkillPoint: Reduce another skill first to add a skill point.
skillPointAssignment.limitReached: Limit reached: Only 1 new point and 1 transfer are allowed per level-up.

rulesBuilder.errorSchemaLoadBefore: Could not load schema for rule type
rulesBuilder.errorSchemaLoadAfter: . Use the raw-JSON edit button to repair.
rulesBuilder.emptyHint: No rules yet. Click {addRule} to pick a type.
rulesBuilder.priorityTooltip: Application order during data prep. Lower numbers run first.
rulesBuilder.noRulesDefined: No rules defined. Open the builder to add one.
rulesBuilder.dragToCopy: Drag onto another rules list to copy

dicePoolPicker.empty: No dice pools defined on this actor

chargePoolPicker.empty: No charge pools defined on this actor

rulesBuilder.predicateKeyPlaceholder: pick or type a tag key
rulesBuilder.predicateIntro: Restrict when this rule fires. Every row below must match the actor's tags for the rule to apply. Leave empty to always apply.
rulesBuilder.predicatePreviewNoMatch: Currently does not match the parent actor.

predicateOperatorHints.is: Actor must be tagged with this exact value.
predicateOperatorHints.isOneOf: Actor must be tagged with any one of these values.
predicateOperatorHints.isAtLeast: The numeric value associated with this key must be at least this.
predicateOperatorHints.isAtMost: The numeric value associated with this key must be at most this.
predicateOperatorHints.isExactly: The numeric value associated with this key must equal this.
predicateOperatorHints.isBetween: The numeric value associated with this key must be within this range.

abilityBonus.description: Add a flat or formula-based bonus to one or more ability scores. Use ‘all’ to apply to every ability.

value.label: Bonus
value.hint: A flat number, formula (e.g. @level), or dice expression.

abilities.label: Apply to
abilities.hint: Pick one or more abilities. Use "all" to apply to every ability.

applyCondition.description: Apply a status condition to a target (or self) when a trigger fires — on a hit, crit, miss, save fail, turn start, etc.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.hint: When this condition is applied — on hit/crit, on save fail, on turn start, etc.

armorClass.description: Add, multiply, or override the character’s armor class with a formula.

formula.label: Formula
formula.hint: A flat number or formula. Combined per the mode below.

mode.label: How to apply
mode.hint: Add: stack on top of current AC. Multiply: scale current AC. Override: replace current AC.

chargeConsumer.description: Spend charges from an item or actor pool when this rule’s owner is activated.

diceConsumer.description: Spend or auto-apply dice from an item or actor dice pool. "Manual" mode prompts the player at activation; "Auto-bonus" adds every rolled die face to qualifying attacks without consuming the pool.

chargePool.description: Define a refillable pool of charges (per item or actor) with one or more recovery triggers.

scope.label: Scope
scope.hint: Where the pool lives. "Item" pools live on this item; "Actor" pools live on the actor and can be shared by features that reference the same identifier.

max.label: Max charges
max.hint: Capacity formula. Flat (3), formula (@key), or actor data (@strength).

dieSize.label: Die size
dieSize.hint: Optional. Set when charges are spent by rolling a die (e.g. Combat Dice). Leave blank for plain counters.

initial.label: Initial
initial.hint: Whether the pool starts full or empty when first granted.

recoveries.label: Recoveries
recoveries.hint: When and how charges are restored. Add an entry per trigger.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.hint: Event that drives this recovery (rest type, encounter event, hit, etc.).

mode.label: Mode
mode.hint: How the value applies: "add" (gain N), "set" (set to N), or "refresh" (fill to max).

value.label: Value
value.hint: Amount used by the mode. Flat or formula. Ignored when mode is "refresh".

combatMana.description: Grant a mana resource on a combat trigger and clear it on a configurable event.

conditionImmunity.description: Make the actor immune to one or more named conditions.

conditions.label: Immune to
conditions.hint: The actor is fully immune to these conditions and cannot be affected by them.

damageBonus.description: Add a flat, formula, or dice-expression bonus to damage dealt by attacks of a given delivery (melee/ranged) and source (weapon/spell).

damageType.label: Damage type
damageType.hint: Restrict to attacks of this type. Leave blank to match all.

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.hint: Restrict to melee or ranged attacks. "Any" matches both.

source.label: Source
source.hint: Restrict to weapon or spell attacks. "Any" matches both.

targetCondition.label: Target condition
targetCondition.hint: Optional predicate evaluated against the target's state. Bonus only applies when the target matches. Use $and / $or with atom strings, e.g. { "$or": ["target:bloodied", "target:concentrating"] }.

dicePool.description: Define a refillable pool of rolled dice (each die stores its rolled face). Used for snowballing damage pools (Fury Dice) and rolled resources (Judgment Dice).

scope.label: Scope
scope.hint: Where the pool lives. "Item" pools live on this item; "Actor" pools live on the actor and can be shared by features that reference the same identifier.

dieSize.label: Die size
dieSize.hint: Size of each die stored in the pool.

max.label: Max dice
max.hint: Maximum number of dice the pool can hold. Flat (3), formula (@key), or actor data (@strength).

initial.label: Initial
initial.hint: Whether the pool starts full (pre-rolled to max) or empty when first granted.

refills.label: Refills
refills.hint: When and how dice are added back to the pool. Add an entry per trigger.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.hint: Event that drives this refill (rest type, encounter event, taken damage, etc.).

mode.label: Mode
mode.hint: How the value applies: "add" (roll N new dice), "set" (rebuild pool to N), or "refresh" (fill to max).

value.label: Value
value.hint: Amount used by the mode. Flat or formula. Ignored when mode is "refresh".

grantMovement.description: Grant a base movement mode (walk, fly, climb, swim, or burrow). Multiple grants of the same mode take the highest base; speed bonuses stack on top.

speed.label: Speed
speed.hint: Base speed for this mode. Use a formula like @attributes.movement.walk to match walk speed, or a number like 12.

grantItem.description: Grant an item by UUID when this rule’s owner is created on an actor. Optional duplicate gating and quantity override.

grantProficiency.description: Grant proficiency in armor, weapons, or languages. Use ‘all’ to grant every value of the chosen type.

grantSpells.description: Grant spells by school + tier filter, by UUID, or by user choice.

uuids.label: Specific spells
uuids.hint: Drag spells from a compendium or sidebar onto each slot to grant them directly.

healingPotionBonus.description: Add a flat or formula-based bonus to healing received from potions.

hitDiceAdvantage.description: Grant advantage on hit-dice rolls under a specific narrative condition (e.g., ‘in the wild’).

incrementHitDice.description: Increase the size of the actor’s hit dice (e.g. d8 → d10) by a flat or formula amount.

initiativeBonus.description: Add a flat or formula-based bonus to the actor’s initiative roll.

initiativeMessage.description: Display a message at initiative roll time. Supports `{value}` interpolation from a formula.

initiativeRollMode.description: Set or adjust the actor’s default initiative roll mode (advantage/disadvantage).

maxHitDice.description: Add to the actor’s maximum hit dice. Optionally targets a specific die size.

maxHpBonus.description: Add a flat bonus to the actor’s maximum HP. With `perLevel`, the bonus scales with character level.

perLevel.label: Multiply by character level
perLevel.hint: When on, the bonus is applied per level (e.g. +2 per level → +20 at level 10).

maximizeHitDice.description: Causes hit-dice rolls to take their maximum value instead of rolling.

maxWounds.description: Add to the actor’s maximum wounds before death.

modifyPool.description: Override or scale an existing dice or charge pool (by identifier) — typically attached to a level-up feature to upgrade die size or expand max.

poolType.label: Pool type
poolType.hint: Which subsystem to target: dice pools (rolled faces) or charge pools (counters).

poolIdentifier.label: Pool identifier
poolIdentifier.hint: The `identifier` of the pool to modify (e.g. `fury`, `judgment`, `combat-dice`).

dieSize.label: Die size override
dieSize.hint: Replace the target pool's die size. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.

maxDelta.label: Max delta
maxDelta.hint: Signed amount added to the target pool's max (e.g. "+1", "-1", "+@level"). Leave blank to keep max unchanged.

note.description: Display a free-form note on the sheet, with visibility scoped to the GM, the owner, or all viewers.

savingThrowBonus.description: Add a flat or formula-based bonus to one or more saving throws. Use ‘all’ to apply to every save.

value.label: Bonus
value.hint: A flat number, formula, or dice expression added to the save.

savingThrows.label: Apply to
savingThrows.hint: Pick one or more saves. Use "all" to apply to every save.

savingThrowRollMode.description: Set or adjust the saving throw roll mode (advantage/disadvantage), optionally requiring a player choice at use.

skillBonus.description: Add a flat or formula-based bonus to one or more skills. Use ‘all’ to apply to every skill.

value.label: Bonus
value.hint: A flat number, formula, or dice expression added to the skill check.

skills.label: Apply to
skills.hint: Pick one or more skills. Use "all" to apply to every skill.

speedBonus.description: Add a bonus to the actor’s speed. Without an explicit movement type, applies to walk; otherwise scoped to fly/swim/climb/burrow.

value.label: Bonus
value.hint: Bonus to speed in tiles. Negative numbers reduce speed.

movementType.label: Movement type (blank = walk)
movementType.hint: Leave blank to apply to walk speed only. Pick a specific type to grant or modify it.

unarmedDamage.description: Override the actor’s unarmed-strike damage formula.

charges.noPoolsForItem: No charge pools for this item.
charges.rechargePrompt: Enter how many charges to add to {pool}.

notifications.poolMissing: {item} requires the charge pool "{pool}", but it is not available.
notifications.insufficient: {item} needs {required} charge(s) from "{pool}", but only {available} are available.

dicePoolTracker.rollOneIntoPool: Roll one die into this pool

creatureFeatures.actionSequence: After each hero's turn, choose one.

ctSettings.allowPlayersViewExpandedMonsters: Allow Players to View Expanded Monsters

heroicActions.title: Heroic Actions

defend.label: Defend
defend.description: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor value. At the GM's discretion, some damage may not be avoidable (e.g., psychic damage, or some areas of effect).
defend.panelDescription: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor ({armor}). Some damage like psychic or certain area effects may not be avoidable.
defend.title: Defend
defend.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Defend, reducing damage by their Armor value ({armor}).

interpose.label: Interpose
interpose.description: When a creature within 2 spaces would be struck with an attack, you can push them out of the way and become the new target. You enter their space and move them to an adjacent space of your choice.
interpose.panelDescription: When an ally within 2 spaces would be hit, push them aside and become the new target. You enter their space and move them adjacent.
interpose.title: Interpose
interpose.tip: Combine with Defend to also reduce the damage you take!
interpose.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Interpose, stepping in front of {target} to become the target of an attack.

interposeAndDefend.chatMessage: {name} uses 2 reactions to Interpose for {target} and Defend, reducing damage by their Armor value ({armor}).

opportunity.label: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.description: Make a melee attack against an adjacent enemy as it willingly moves away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks - monsters cannot.
opportunity.panelDescription: Strike an adjacent enemy as they willingly move away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks.
opportunity.title: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.disadvantage: This attack is made with disadvantage
opportunity.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to make an Opportunity Attack with {weapon}.

help.label: Help
help.description: Grant an ally advantage on a roll if you can reasonably explain to the GM how you could help in the situation. Limited to one Help reaction per roll.
help.panelDescription: Grant an ally advantage on a roll by explaining how you help. The GM may require a skill check. Limited to one Help per roll.
help.title: Help
help.effect: Grants an ally advantage on their roll
help.tip: Think fast when an ally fails! A creative explanation might turn failure into success.
help.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Help {target}, granting them advantage on their roll.

move.title: Move
move.panelDescription: Move up to your speed. You can split movement around other actions.

confirmReaction.title: Use Reaction?
confirmReaction.activeTurnMessage: Reactions are performed when it is not your turn.
confirmReaction.noActionsMessage: Reactions cost 1 action and you have none remaining.
confirmReaction.spentMessage: Each reaction can be performed no more than 1/round, and you've already used {reaction} this round.
confirmReaction.confirmQuestion: Do you still want to use the {reaction} reaction?

confirmMove.title: Move?
confirmMove.noActionsMessage: You've used all your actions this round.
confirmMove.confirmQuestion: Do you still want to move?

confirmAttack.confirmQuestion: Do you still want to attack?

macroWarnings.selectCharacterToken: Select a character token to use this action
macroWarnings.mustBeInCombat: You must be in combat to use {action}

heroicActions.confirmEndTurnEarlyBody: You haven't used all your actions yet. Are you sure you want to end your turn?
heroicActions.noPermissionEndTurn: You do not have permission to end turns.
heroicActions.noPermissionRollInitiative: You do not have permission to roll initiative.
heroicActions.initiativeAlreadyRolled: Initiative has already been rolled for this combatant.
heroicActions.noWeapons: No weapons or attack features found.

help.tooltip: What can I do in combat?

actions.intro: On your turn, you get 3 actions. All 3 recharge at the end of your turn, so spend them all! Generally, doing any single thing costs 1 action.
actions.footer: Rushed Attacks: Additional attacks after the first impose cumulative disadvantage.

attack.title: Attack
attack.description: Roll the die listed on your weapon or ability. Rolling a 1 is a miss. Rolling max on the Primary Die is a critical hit - roll again and add! Crits ignore armor.

spell.title: Cast a Spell
spell.description: Requires a free hand (or focus) and the ability to speak. Costs mana equal to the spell's tier (cantrips are free). You can upcast spells for greater effect.

move.title: Move
move.description: Move up to your speed (usually 6 spaces). You can split movement around other actions and Move multiple times per turn. Difficult terrain halves speed.

assess.title: Assess
assess.description: Make a DC 12 skill check to: Ask a Question (GM answers honestly), Create an Opening (+1 to Primary Die vs target), or Anticipate Danger (-1 to Primary Dice against you). Can't reuse the same skill in an encounter!

free.title: Free Actions
free.description: Simple tasks like opening an unlocked door, shouting a phrase, dropping an item, or ending concentration. Limited to once per turn.

reactions.intro: Reactions cost 1 action and are used when it's not your turn. Each reaction can only be used once per round, and you'll start your next turn with fewer actions.
reactions.footer: You can combine reactions (like Interpose + Defend) if you have enough actions to spend!

defend.title: Defend
defend.description: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor value. Some damage (like psychic or certain area effects) may not be avoidable at the GM's discretion.

interpose.title: Interpose
interpose.description: When a creature within 2 spaces would be hit, push them aside and become the new target. You enter their space and move them to an adjacent space of your choice.

opportunity.title: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.description: Make a melee attack with disadvantage against an adjacent enemy as it willingly moves away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks - monsters cannot.

help.title: Help
help.description: Grant an ally advantage on a roll if you can explain how you'd help. The GM may call for a skill check or grant it automatically. Limited to one Help per roll.

assess.noTargetsHint: Target a token on the canvas to select it
assess.tooManyTargetsHint: You can only target one creature at a time for this action
assess.cannotTargetSelf: You cannot target yourself. Target another creature on the canvas.

askQuestion.title: Ask a Question
askQuestion.description: Ask the GM a question about the situation. They must answer truthfully based on what your character could reasonably perceive.
askQuestion.success: {name} used an action to assess and may ask the GM one question. The GM will answer honestly.
askQuestion.failure: {name} used an action to assess but failed to glean any useful information.

createOpening.title: Create an Opening
createOpening.description: Your next attack against the target gains +1 to the Primary Die this round.
createOpening.success: {name} used an action to assess {target} and create an opening. Their next attack against {target} gains +1 to the Primary Die.
createOpening.failure: {name} used an action to assess {target} but failed to create an opening.

anticipateDanger.title: Anticipate Danger
anticipateDanger.description: All Primary Dice rolled against you are reduced by 1 this round.
anticipateDanger.success: {name} used an action to assess and anticipate danger. All Primary Dice rolled against them are reduced by 1 this round.
anticipateDanger.failure: {name} used an action to assess but failed to anticipate danger.

move.title: Move
move.panelDescription: Move up to your speed. You can split movement around other actions and move multiple times per turn.
move.confirmDescription: Confirm that you've repositioned your character on the battlefield.
move.chatMessage: {name} used an action to Move, with a speed of {speed} spaces.

hitDice.bonusHitDiceHint: Hit dice bonuses received from boons, ancestries, or features
hitDice.hitDiceSizeIncreased: All hit dice sizes are increased by {steps} step(s)
hitDice.heading: Hit Dice

hitPoints.bonusHpHint: Static bonus from feats, items, or other sources

manaConfig.classContributionsHint: Formula-based mana gained from your classes
manaConfig.baseManaHint: Static mana before class formula contributions
manaConfig.initiativeInfo: Initiative recovery is currently informational only.

safeRest.allResourcesFull: All resources are already at full capacity.

fieldRest.catchBreathDescription: 10 min rest. Roll Hit Dice + STR to heal.
fieldRest.makeCampDescription: 8 hour rest. Take max Hit Die value + STR.
fieldRest.noHitDiceAvailable: No hit dice available to spend

npcSheet.dropError: Failed to process dropped item. Please report this issue.
npcSheet.lastStandHpHint: 0 disables Last Stand. When the monster hits 0 HP they're healed to this value and gain the Last Stand condition. Rulebook suggests level × 10.

classSheet.progressionSourceTagWorldTooltip: World Item: created or modified locally in this world
classSheet.progressionSourceTagPackTooltip: Compendium Pack: from a published compendium pack
classSheet.progressionDeleteWorldItemContent: Delete {name}? This will permanently remove this locally created item from your world.
classSheet.progressionChooseFromBelow: Choose one from the Feature Choices section below.
classSheet.progressionNoSubclasses: No subclasses available. Click the + button to create one.
classSheet.progressionNoFeatureChoices: No feature choices available. Click the + button to create one.

movementConfig.gridSpacesNote: All measurements are in grid spaces.

poolNode.debugPredicateSkipped: {item}: pool node for "{pool}" skipped (predicate {predicate} not met)

characterSettings.executeItemMacros: Execute Item Macros on Item Activation

classFeatureSelection.hint: The following features are available at level 1 for your class. Some features are automatically granted, while others require you to make a choice.
classFeatureSelection.levelUpHint: The following features become available at level {level}. Some are automatically granted; others require you to choose.

subclassSelection.noSubclasses: No subclasses available for this class. You may need to create or import subclass items.

epicBoonSelection.hint: At level 19, choose an epic boon to enhance your character.
epicBoonSelection.noBoons: No epic boons available. You may need to create or import boon items.

spellGrants.hintClass: Your class grants you these spells.
spellGrants.hintBackground: Your background grants you these spells.
spellGrants.hintAncestry: Your ancestry grants you these spells.
spellGrants.levelUpHint: You gain the following spells at this level.

classSelection.noClassesAvailable: There are no classes available in this world's compendium packs.

scaling.heading: Spell Scaling
scaling.targetEffectHint: Add effects in the Activation tab to select targets here.

autoExpandRolls.name: Auto-Expand Rolls
autoExpandRolls.hint: When enabled, dice roll details are shown inline below each roll in chat messages, without needing to hover.

autoAddCharacterToCombatOnInitiativeRoll.name: Auto-Add Character To Combat On Initiative Roll
autoAddCharacterToCombatOnInitiativeRoll.hint: When enabled, rolling initiative from a character sheet adds that character to the current scene combat before rolling, if they are not already in combat.

autoTrackTokenAdjacency.name: Auto-Track Token Adjacency
autoTrackTokenAdjacency.hint: When enabled, the system automatically tracks the adjacency status of combatants.

adjacencyIncludesDiagonals.name: Adjacency Includes Diagonals
adjacencyIncludesDiagonals.hint: When enabled, tokens that share only a corner are considered adjacent (diagonal adjacency). When disabled, only tokens sharing a full edge are adjacent (orthogonal only).

autoApplyConditions.name: Auto-Apply Conditions from Rules
autoApplyConditions.hint: Automatically apply conditions from feature rules when their trigger fires. When off, rules still surface on the chat card for manual GM application.

ncswEnabled.name: Enable Combat System
ncswEnabled.hint: Show the Combat System panel during combat. Helps GMs quickly target heroes and roll attacks for minions, monsters, and legendary monsters.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: Enables developer tools like the dice testbench. Changes take effect immediately.

combatTrackerHoverColor.name: Combat Tracker Hover Color
combatTrackerHoverColor.hint: Choose your personal token hover highlight color

combatTrackerPlayersCanExpandMonsterCard.name: Combat Tracker Monster Card Visibility
combatTrackerPlayersCanExpandMonsterCard.hint: Allow players to view individual monster and minion cards when the GM expands them

combatTrackerResourceDrawerHover.name: Combat Tracker Resource Drawer Hover
combatTrackerResourceDrawerHover.hint: When enabled, player resource drawers open only on hover

combatTrackerPlayerHpBarTextMode.name: Combat Tracker Player HP Bar Center Text
combatTrackerPlayerHpBarTextMode.hint: Choose whether player HP bars show nothing, health state, or HP percentage

combatTrackerNonPlayerHpBarEnabled.name: Combat Tracker Non-Player HP Bar
combatTrackerNonPlayerHpBarEnabled.hint: Show a hit point bar below individual non-player combatant cards

combatTrackerNonPlayerHpBarTextMode.name: Combat Tracker Non-Player HP Bar Center Text
combatTrackerNonPlayerHpBarTextMode.hint: Choose whether centered text in the non-player HP bar shows nothing, health state, or HP percentage

combatTrackerEnabled.name: Enable Combat Tracker
combatTrackerEnabled.hint: Show the Combat Tracker at the top of the screen

combatTrackerWidthLevel.name: Combat Tracker Width Level
combatTrackerWidthLevel.hint: Controls how wide Combat Tracker can be in the top tracker

combatTrackerCardSizeLevel.name: Combat Tracker Card Size Level
combatTrackerCardSizeLevel.hint: Controls how large Combat Tracker combatant cards appear

combatTrackerActionDiceColor.name: Combat Tracker Action Color
combatTrackerActionDiceColor.hint: Choose your personal action color for Combat Tracker

combatTrackerReactionColor.name: Combat Tracker Reaction Color
combatTrackerReactionColor.hint: Choose your personal reaction color for Combat Tracker

combatTrackerLeftToRightOrdering.name: Combat Tracker Left-to-Right Ordering
combatTrackerLeftToRightOrdering.hint: Display combatants in fixed left-to-right order instead of centering the active combatant

combatTrackerCurrentTurnColorLegacy.name: Combat Tracker Current Turn Color (Legacy)
combatTrackerCurrentTurnColorLegacy.hint: Legacy current turn color setting used before per-animation colors

combatTrackerCurrentTurnPulseAnimation.name: Combat Tracker Current Turn Pulse Animation
combatTrackerCurrentTurnPulseAnimation.hint: Enable pulse animation for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnPulseSpeed.name: Combat Tracker Current Turn Pulse Speed
combatTrackerCurrentTurnPulseSpeed.hint: Adjust pulse animation speed for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlow.name: Combat Tracker Current Turn Border Glow
combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlow.hint: Enable border glow for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlowColor.name: Combat Tracker Border Glow Color
combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlowColor.hint: Color used by the border glow for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlowSize.name: Combat Tracker Border Glow Size
combatTrackerCurrentTurnBorderGlowSize.hint: Adjust the glow size for the active combatant card border

combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawler.name: Combat Tracker Current Turn Edge Crawler
combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawler.hint: Enable edge crawler effect for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawlerColor.name: Combat Tracker Edge Crawler Color
combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawlerColor.hint: Color used by the edge crawler for the active combatant card

combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawlerSize.name: Combat Tracker Edge Crawler Size
combatTrackerCurrentTurnEdgeCrawlerSize.hint: Adjust capsule size for the active combatant edge crawler effect

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.hint: Click a preset to populate the Roll Builder with that scenario's configuration, then click Roll (or toggle Force Crit/Miss) to see how the engine handles it.

rollBuilder.title: Roll Builder
rollBuilder.placeholder: (formula, flags, roll buttons will go here)
rollBuilder.actorContextHint: The selected actor's roll data is passed to the formula (so @abilities.strength.mod etc. resolve), and the actor's type and proficiency list determine whether canCrit gets suppressed.

suppressionReason.nonProficient: actor is not proficient with this weapon type

rollBuilder.weaponTypeHint: Leave blank for a permissive weapon (anyone can crit). Set to a weapon type like 'Longsword' to require the attacker has that entry in their proficiencies — non-proficient wielders cannot crit. Pick from the suggestions or type your own to test edge cases.
rollBuilder.critSuppressedLine: Crit will be suppressed for non-proficiency: {state}

rollModeSources.title: Advantage / disadvantage sources
rollModeSources.hint: Count how many advantage and disadvantage sources apply. The engine sums them into a net rollMode: advantage and disadvantage cancel 1-for-1. Use this to test how multiple sources combine on a single roll.

specific.hint: Enter exact values for each die. Blank = random.

errors.noPrimaryDie: No primary die found in formula.

results.title: Results
results.placeholder: (rolled dice and outcome will go here)

combatTrackerSettings.title: Combat Tracker Settings
combatTrackerSettings.introText: Current Turn Animation controls are live. All other sections remain preview-only.
combatTrackerSettings.layoutHint: Choose where the tracker docks on screen.
combatTrackerSettings.allowPlayersToMoveCards: Allow players to move other players' cards
combatTrackerSettings.warnOnEndTurn: Warn players when clicking "End Turn" with actions remaining
combatTrackerSettings.roleBasedControlsHint: The GM-facing permission matrix below is UI-only and not yet wired to behavior.
combatTrackerSettings.extensibilityHint: Additional combat tracker settings can be added to this window over time.
combatTrackerSettings.playersCanMoveCards: Players can move other players cards
combatTrackerSettings.warnOnEndTurnLabel: Warn on End Turn with actions left

warnings.endTurnNotApplied: End turn was not applied because this group is not currently active.

notifications.noActiveCombatForGroupAttack: No active combat found for group attack.
notifications.selectTargetBeforeGroupAttack: Select token target before rolling a group attack.
notifications.groupAttackFailed: Group attack failed. See console for details.
notifications.noActiveCombatForMonsterAttack: No active combat found for monster attack.
notifications.selectActionBeforeRoll: Select an action for {name} before rolling.
notifications.monsterAttackFailed: Monster attack failed. See console for details.
notifications.selectedGroupHasNoAliveMinions: Selected group has no alive minions to attack.
notifications.couldNotOpenPanel: Could not open group attack panel. See console for details.

world.starting: Migrating world data to Nimble v{version}.
world.completedWithErrors: World migration completed with {count} error(s). Check the browser console (F12) for details.

dialog.title: Nimble (Dev) — One-time Migration
dialog.intro: This world was originally created under the stable Nimble system. The Dev build installs under a separate system id ("nimble-dev"), so Foundry stores its flags and settings in a different namespace from the stable install.
dialog.body: Click Continue to copy all existing Nimble flags and settings on this world into the Dev namespace so your characters, items, and settings work in the Dev build. This runs once per world.
dialog.warning: After this runs, the original Nimble data is removed from this world. If you want to keep using the stable Nimble system with this world, cancel now and use a separate world for the Dev build instead.

notifications.starting: Nimble (Dev): rebranding world data from nimble → nimble-dev...
notifications.failed: Nimble (Dev): world data rebrand failed. Check the browser console (F12) for details.

json.selectHint: Click to browse, or drag a file here
json.parseError: Could not read that file. Make sure it's a character exported as JSON.
json.notACharacterError: That file isn't a player character export. Only player characters can be imported here.
json.wrongSystemError: That file was exported from a different game system. Only Nimble character exports can be imported.
json.importError: Failed to import the character. Please try again.
json.noItems: This character has no embedded items.

pdfExport.insertAtCursor: Inserts selected items at your cursor's position
pdfExport.columnOverflow: Content exceeds estimated column capacity. Some text may be cut off.
